artPrompt: A wild goblin balancing a glowing slab on his head like a circus act amid election-night chaos, arms flung wide, one foot lifted, sparks and confetti showering up the wide frame against ember-red flame and night-black smoke. Overturned ballot boxes and flying coins blur into orange wash below. A daredevil feat of fiscal absurdity caught mid-wobble, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Balance the Budget
text:
Balance this card on your head. While it is balanced there, you control all combat.
If it falls before your turn ends, Balance the Budget deals damage to you equal to the number of times it touched the table on the way down (minimum 1). Round up. Gravity is a tax.
If it never falls, congratulations, draw a card and also you are now the Mayor's favorite accountant.
flavorText: Fiscal responsibility, but make it a circus act.

extras.physicalAction: balance the card on your head
